mapper.select: SELECT h.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM harvest_record h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON h.zone_id = z.id ORDER BY h.create_time DESC

SELECT h.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM harvest_record h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON h.zone_id = z.id WHERE h.zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY h.create_time DESC

SELECT h.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM harvest_record h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON h.zone_id = z.id WHERE h.worker_id = #{workerId} ORDER BY h.create_time DESC
SELECT h.*, u.real_name AS worker_name, z.zone_name FROM harvest_record h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.worker_id = u.id LEFT JOIN farm_zone z ON h.zone_id = z.id WHERE h.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO harvest_record(zone_id, worker_id, batch_no, actual_weight, grade_a, grade_b, grade_c, remark) VALUES(#{zoneId}, #{workerId}, #{batchNo}, #{actualWeight}, #{gradeA}, #{gradeB}, #{gradeC}, #{remark})
